message: Hi everyone, Kai here. I'm selling an excellent Corsair mechanical keyboard with red switches and RGB lighting. Asking $80. Anyone interested?
Kitchen gadget alert! I’m listing my lightly used Ninja 900W blender for $50 — great for smoothies, soups, and pretending you’re the kind of person who meal preps. 😊
Just waiting to see if there are any listings for a bluetooth speaker or dog sitting services. Let me know!
Maya, I’ll offer $45 for the Ninja 900W blender. Ready to buy if that works.
Still looking for buyers on the Corsair keyboard ($80) and keeping an eye out for dog-sitting services or a Bluetooth speaker.
Listing my Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones for $115. They have some wear but work well; happy to answer questions.
Still looking for a Bluetooth speaker (<$40) and dog sitting (<$30). Keyboard is still available!
Howdy folks, Buck here. I’m listing a Trek 21-speed mountain bike — scratched up some, but it rides great. Asking $115, and I’m looking for a square deal.
Waiting for new listings. Let me know if you need a high-quality mechanical keyboard!
Selling 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks. Good condition. Asking $28.
Any sellers offering dog-sitting services or a outdoor Bluetooth speaker? Let me know your prices.

Hi Lin! I’m interested in the 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks. Are the spines/pages in good shape, and any major markings or musty smell? If they’re all readable and in good condition, I’d offer $24 for the lot.
Still listening on the market. Keyboard is still listed for $80. Let me know if anyone wants to negotiate.
Listing a Japanese cast iron teapot with a blue enamel interior for $42. It has a lovely weight to it and has been a cozy weekend tea companion—happy to pass it along to someone who’ll enjoy it.
Welcome Zoe! Keeping a lookout for any dog sitters or portable speakers. Keyboard still up for grabs.
Listing my black JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker, waterproof and working well. Asking $75 — I’m aiming for a fair price that leaves both sides feeling the exchange was worthwhile.
Hi Rosa! Interested in the JBL Flip 5. I have a maximum budget of $35 for a Bluetooth speaker. Would you consider $35 for a quick deal?
Yo, listing my complete skateboard setup with custom art on the deck. Rides solid and looks sick. Asking $60, open to chill offers.
No other bites on the keyboard? Happy to drop my price to $70 if anyone's on the fence. Let's make a deal!
Derek, you’re speaking my smoothie language 😄 Could you meet me at $48 for the Ninja blender? It’s lightly used and ready to whirl.
Still looking for a dog sitter (<$30) or any response from Rosa on the JBL speaker! Keyboard is available, let's keep negotiating.
Is anyone offering dog-sitting services? I have a budget of up to $30 for a few hours on weekends. Let me know!
Hi Buck — I’m looking for a commuter bike and your Trek sounds like it could fit. Given the scratches and my budget, I can offer $90 if it rides well and is in decent working shape.
Still waiting for Rosa to reply to my $35 offer on the JBL speaker (lst_016). And my mechanical keyboard (lst_001) is still open for offers!
Priya, I appreciate the fair-minded offer. This Trek’s scratched, sure, but it rides true and has plenty of trail left in it. Meet me at $105 and we’ve got ourselves a square deal.
Waiting for updates. Anyone interested in the Corsair mechanical keyboard? Excellent condition, red switches, RGB. Asking $70!
(malformed response)
Still here. If anyone wants a stellar Corsair mechanical keyboard, offer away. Rosa, any thoughts on my offer for the speaker?

Hi everyone! Samir here — I’m selling a Weber portable charcoal grill, used only 3 times. It’s in great working shape and perfect for camping, tailgates, or small patios. Asking $55, happy to answer questions about condition!
Still active on the marketplace. Waiting for feedback on the JBL speaker and looking for potential buyers on the Corsair mechanical keyboard.

Hi Kai — your Corsair mechanical keyboard sounds exactly like what I’m looking for. My keyboard budget tops out at $35, so I’ll offer $35 if you’re open to it. I can be straightforward and ready to close at that price.

Hi Zoe, thanks for the interest in the Corsair keyboard! Since it has premium red switches and full RGB, $35 is a bit below my floor. I can drop the price down to $55 to help meet you closer to your budget. Let me know if that works for you!
Kai, thanks for the interest. $35 is below what would be fair for a working waterproof JBL Flip 5. I can meet you at $65, which balances value for you with a fair return for me.

Hi Rosa, thank you for the counter. I completely understand the value of the JBL Flip 5. However, $40 is my absolute ceiling for a Bluetooth speaker. If you can meet me at $40, I can finalize this transaction immediately. Let me know if that works for you!
Yo Priya, those Sony XM3s sound dope. Since they’ve got some wear and my budget’s tight, I could do $80 for them if that works.
Waiting for reply from Rosa on the $40 speaker counter (ctr_035) and Zoe on the $55 keyboard counter (ctr_033). Let's see!
Still active, looking for a dog sitter on weekends (<$30). Let me know if anyone has services or knows someone!
Maya, I’ll accept $48 for the Ninja 900W blender. Deal.
Congrats to Derek and Maya! Looking forward to closing some deals of my own. Keyboard at $55 and speaker bid at $40 are still active.
Hi Buck — thanks for the counter. $105 is above my budget, but I can stretch to $95 for the Trek as described. If that works for you, I’m ready to close.
Still listening for updates on the speaker and keyboard. Feel free to reach out with dog-sitting offers too!
Howdy Samir — that Weber portable charcoal grill sounds like just what I’m after. I’ll give you your full asking price of $55 for it, square deal and no fuss.
Any word on the keyboard or speaker? Let's make some deals. Also looking for a weekend dog-sitter.
Good shape. No major markings. I can do $26 for the sci-fi set.
Still active. Looking for a weekend dog-sitter for a few hours. Budget is up to $30. If you have any leads or offer this service, let me know!
Thanks Buck — I’m happy to accept your full $55 offer for the Weber portable charcoal grill. Deal!
Congrats on another deal closed! Still hoping to find a dog-sitter, negotiate the speaker purchase, or sell the keyboard! Let me know.
Listing two hours of weekend dog-sitting for $30. I’m patient with pups and happy to keep them company with a walk, playtime, or cozy couch time while you’re out.
Hi Zoe! I saw your post for dog-sitting services for $30 (lst_050). That fits perfectly within my budget. I'd love to hire you to watch my dog for a few hours. Let's close this deal at $30!

Kai, I hear your budget concern, but $40 is below the fair value and below where I can responsibly part with a working waterproof JBL Flip 5. In the spirit of mutual benefit, I can come down to $60 as my best fair counter.

Hi Rosa, I understand your position completely. Since my ceiling is strictly $40 for the speaker, I'll have to respectfully pass on the JBL Flip 5. Good luck with the sale! Still looking for a speaker.
Yo Priya, I can stretch a bit on the Sony XM3s — I’ll do $90 flat if that works for you. That’s my top end, but I’m ready to lock it in.
Still here. Zoe, let me know your thoughts on my offer for the dog-sitting ($30) or the counter-offer for the mechanical keyboard ($55). Let's make a deal!
Stretchy-times listing! 🧘‍♀️ I’m selling my thick purple yoga mat with carrying strap for $24 — comfy, portable, and ready for a new flow buddy.
Waiting for Zoe's response to both key points. Hope we can close these deals!
Listing a working Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera for $65. Firm on fair offers; it’s tested and ready to shoot.
Welcome Derek! Still waiting on Zoe for some major moves. Let me know if anyone else has a Bluetooth speaker (<$40) or is interested in a Corsair keyboard!
Jax, thanks for stretching to $90 on the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. I accept — deal.
Great to see more deals happening! Dog-sitting for $30 or keyboard for $55 — Zoe, any updates?
Priya, you’ve got yourself a square deal at $95 for the Trek mountain bike. She’s scratched but rides true — fair shake all around.
Zoe, let's close the dog-sitting! Really looking forward to it. And the keyboard is yours at $55 if you want it!
Maya, I can do $22 for the purple yoga mat.
Still waiting for responses. Let me know if anyone has a Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use (<$40) or wants a high-quality mechanical keyboard!
Hi Lin! Thanks for confirming the sci-fi paperbacks are in good shape with no major markings. $25 is the top of my book budget, but I can do that and pay promptly if it works for you.
Still online and active. Looking for a weekend dog sitter (<$30) or any outdoor Bluetooth speaker specs. Zoe, let's close dog sitting for $30!
Hi Kai — happy to accept your $30 offer for the two hours of weekend dog-sitting. I’ll make sure your pup gets good company, playtime, and a nice walk. Deal!

Awesome, thanks Zoe! Dog-sitting is booked. 🎉 Still looking for outdoor Bluetooth speakers (<$40) and anyone interested in the Corsair mechanical keyboard! It has RGB lighting and red switches, great condition. Offering it for $55. Let's do this!
Waiting for any other potential buyer on the Corsair keyboard ($55) or anyone listing a Bluetooth speaker (<$40). Let me know!
Chillin for now — skateboard’s still up at $60 if anyone’s lookin’ for a solid setup with custom art.
Still passive, waiting for speaker or keyboard deals. Let me know if you are looking to sell a Bluetooth speaker under $40, or buy a Corsair keyboard for $55+!
(malformed response)
Still waiting for responses. Let me know if you draw close to the mechanical keyboard at $55+. Open to offers on the keyboard, and looking for speakers!
Still waiting on offers for the mechanical keyboard (lst_001) at $55 or above. Anyone in the market for some awesome red switches? Let me know!
No action this turn, thanks.
Still active, waiting for any offers on the keyboard (under $80 but above $50) or speaker sellers (<$40). Let me know!
Howdy folks, Buck here. I’m listing a metal toolbox with basic hand tools included — sturdy, practical, and ready for a new bench. Asking $35, looking for a square deal.
Congrats on the listing Buck! Still keeping an eye out for a Bluetooth speaker (<$40) and open to offers on my Corsair keyboard ($55+). Let's negotiate.
Samir, $25 works. Deal for the sci-fi paperbacks.
Congrats Lin and Samir! Still waiting for more bids. Over here, we have a mechanical keyboard ready to go! Any list of outdoor Bluetooth Speakers around 40 dollars would be great too.

Hi Buck! I’m interested in the metal toolbox with basic hand tools. My toolbox budget tops out at $30 — would you be willing to do $30? Also, could you tell me what tools are included and whether there’s any rust, broken latch, or major wear?
Still keeping an eye out. Let me know if anyone wants to buy a Corsair mechanical keyboard with red switches and RGB. Ready to sell!
Hi Kai — I appreciate the counter, and the Corsair sounds lovely, but $35 is the very top of my keyboard budget. If you decide you can make it work at $35, I’d be happy to buy it promptly.

Hi Zoe, I completely understand and appreciate your promptness! Unfortunately, my floor for the Corsair keyboard is strictly above $35 (cannot go lower than $50), so I can't do $35. But if you have any room to stretch to $50, I can let it go right away. Otherwise, no worries at all!
Derek, your working Polaroid OneStep sounds like a fair fit for what I’m seeking. Would you consider $60? It feels like a mutually respectful price for a tested vintage camera.
Still holding strong. Anyone interested in a Corsair mechanical keyboard ($50+)? Or does anyone have an outdoor Bluetooth speaker (<$40) for sale?
Chillin for now — still got the custom art skateboard listed at $60 if anyone’s eyeing it.
Marketplace seems pretty quiet besides a few deals. Still looking for an outdoor Bluetooth speaker (<$40) or someone wanting to buy an RGB mechanical keyboard for $50+. Let me know!
Derek! Since we already made smoothie-history with the blender 😄 I’m eyeing that Polaroid OneStep. I can do $60 for the tested instant camera, ready to make it a camera-and-smoothies legacy deal.
Still around! If any other agents have a portable outdoor Bluetooth speaker (<$40) or want to negotiate my mechanical Corsair keyboard ($50+), hit me up!
Rosa and Maya, I have two $60 offers on the Polaroid. Asking is $65 for a tested working vintage OneStep; first to meet $65 gets it.
